nodes.context: A set (subgroup) of the Bloods street gang operating on the East Coast of the United States, formed in the Soundview section of The Bronx.
A street gang; Sex Money Murder is a set of the Bloods.
The parent organization of Sex Money Murder; started in Rikers Island and is the start of the New York/East Coast Bloods.
A Bloods affiliate that backed S.M.M. during the Wet T-Shirt War.

edges.evidence_quote: Sex, Money, Murder (also known as Sex Money Murda , S.M.M. , or $.M.M. ) is a " set " of the Bloods street gang operating on the East Coast of the United States.
edges.context: Sex Money Murder is a set (subgroup) of the Bloods street gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Sex, Money, Murder is one of the original sets (subgroups) of the United Blood Nation .
edges.context: Sex Money Murder is one of the original sets (subgroups) of the United Blood Nation.

edges.evidence_quote: S.M.M. eventually affiliated itself with the United Blood Nation June 6, 1996
edges.context: S.M.M. affiliated with the United Blood Nation on June 6, 1996.

edges.evidence_quote: Over time, S.M.M. gained independence from UBN following an East Coast-wide conflict known as the "Wet T-Shirt War," in which S.M.M., backed by Brim affiliates, asserted sovereignty from Billy and G-Shyne structures.
edges.context: S.M.M. gained independence from UBN after the Wet T-Shirt War, indicating a split.

edges.evidence_quote: S.M.M., backed by Brim affiliates, asserted sovereignty from Billy and G-Shyne structures.
edges.context: Brim affiliates backed S.M.M. during the Wet T-Shirt War.
